summary: Completed comprehensive testing of premium 4-step concierge enquiry flow for BookMyVenue. All 8 features tested and verified working correctly. Lead successfully created in backend.

issues: Minor accessibility warning - DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers (cosmetic only, does not affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: All 4-step concierge flow features implemented correctly
Investment range dropdown has all 5 options as specified
Submit button correctly shows 'Assign My Venue Expert'
Confirmation screen shows callback ETA, RM name, venue info, and WhatsApp button
Backend integration working - leads are created successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium 4-step concierge enquiry flow fully verified. Flow: Intro (Let's Plan This Together) -> Step 1 (Personal Details) -> Step 2 (Event Details) -> Step 3 (Investment & Preferences) -> Confirmation. All investment options present: Under 5L, 5L-10L, 10L-25L, 25L+, Flexible. Submit button says 'Assign My Venue Expert'. Confirmation shows callback ETA, RM name, venue info, WhatsApp button.
